arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Crystal Palace
arts.sum: CB: Matthijs de Ligt - De Ligt joined the club from Bayern Munich along with Mazraoui and produced a standout performance in United's victory over Southampton last weekend. The world was caving in on Erik ten Hag after his side succumbed to an emphatic 3-0 defeat to Liverpool before the international break and, while victories over Southampton and Barnsley will not come to define the Red Devils' campaign, the triumphs supplied plenty of positives for Ten Hag and company.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag now has elite Man United dilemma Pep Guardiola and Mikel Arteta got right
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news as Erik ten Hag has a luxury of squad depth in the attacking areas that must be utilised efficiently
